subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The world of dust may be illumined by the stars of the firmament, yet the soul and heart of man are enlightened by the radiance of the Most Great Luminary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله عالم خاک بکوکب افلاک روشن گردد و لکن جان و دل انسان بپرتو نیر اعظم
